gist.headline: The docs went on a diet
gist.blurb: We shaved nearly 5,000 lines of repetitive error codes and massive enum lists out of the API documentation. It's the exact same information, just without the endless scrolling.
gist.summary: Reduced the APIDOCS.md file size by 62% by consolidating error responses and simplifying model enum lists.
gist.impact: Developers can now navigate the API documentation much faster without scrolling through thousands of lines of redundant JSON examples.
gist.visual_concept: The Nomnom creature eating a giant stack of redundant error logs and long lists, while Polly the bee holds a neat, single sheet of paper representing the new, concise documentation.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round tan Nomnom creature happily eating a massive stack of redundant error logs while the cute bee mascot, wearing tiny reading glasses, holds up a single, neatly organized piece of paper. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like A Short Hike. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
